hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git\s+(add\s+(-A|--all|\.|\*|-u|--update)|commit\s+.*-a)' && { echo 'BLOCKED: Use specific file paths with git add/commit' >&2; exit 1; } || exit 0

jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'git\s+(reset|rebase)|git\s+commit\s+.*--amend' && { echo 'BLOCKED: Do not rewrite git history. Use fixup!/amend! commits instead (see ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md, Git section). If you need to reset or rebase, ask the user.' >&2; exit 1; } || exit 0
jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -qE 'brew\s+install' && { echo 'BLOCKED: Do not install packages, ask the user to install on your behalf' >&2; exit 1; } || exit 0

exit 0; ps -o args= -p $PPID | grep -qE ' (-p|--print)( |$)' && exit 0; alerter -message "Task completed at $(date '+%I:%M %p')" -sound Glass -title "Claude Code" -subtitle "Ready for next task" -timeout 2
alerter -message "Input needed at $(date '+%I:%M %p')" -sound Basso -title "Claude Code" -subtitle "Waiting for your response" -timeout 2

statusLine.command: input=$(cat); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name' | sed 's/Claude //' | sed 's/ /_/g'); usage=$(echo "$input" | jq '.context_window.current_usage'); if [ "$usage" != "null" ]; then pct=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // 0 | floor'); cost=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.cost.total_cost_usd // 0 | . * 100 | floor | . / 100'); echo "$pct" > /tmp/claude-context-pct-$PPID; printf '%s | %d%% | $%.2f' "$model" "$pct" "$cost"; else printf '%s' "$model"; fi
